name: Kebab it Up!
short_description: Kebab it Up! is a fun and challenging game where you play as Sherban, chasing a runaway kebab through the streets of Bucharest. With challenging levels, a banger soundtrack, and a level editor for creating and playing community-made levels, it's perfect for curious adventurers who love a challenge.
detailed_description:
Custom Levels & Workshop Integration!

Kebab it Up! just got a level editor and it's awesome. You should try it out!
Create your own levels and share them with your friends!


Full Controller Support is live!

You can now play your favorite kebab game using a controller! Eat kebab your way!


About the Game



Take on the role of Sherban, a regular dude who loves kebabs and expensive suits. One day, he's rushing to work and stops at his fave fast-food joint for a tasty kebab. He chomps down on it like a wild man, savoring every bite, when suddenly the kebab jumps out of his hands and takes off. Knowing that he's broke, he sets off after it, determined to catch that darn kebab.



As you guide Sherban through the challenging levels in the streets of Bucharest, you'll need to use your skills to catch that runaway kebab. You'll face obstacles like trash, more trash, parked cars and guys carrying glass panes, but with some quick moves and good timing, you might catch that elusive kebab before it gets away.



The game also boasts a banger soundtrack that'll keep you grooving as you chase down that kebab. And if you're feeling creative, Kebab it Up! even has a level editor that lets you make your own levels or download levels from the game's community on Steam Workshop.
